title: Level 15: JS Variables
guide:
Variables Kya Hain?

Variables computer ki memory me chote dabbe hote hain jahan hum data rakhte hain.

  • let: Aisa dabba jiska saamaan badal sakte hain (Score, Age).
  • const: Aisa dabba jo seal ho jata hai (Pi value, Game Name).
  • String: Text (Quotes "" me).
  • Number: Ginti (Bina quotes ke).
